name: Talked to insurance adjuster after machine accident, did I mess up?

mainEntity.name: Talked to insurance adjuster after machine accident, did I mess up?

acceptedAnswer.text: Maybe; stop talking, get lawyer now.
acceptedAnswer.description: Possibly; recorded statements used against you.[8][3] Key factors: Don't give more without lawyer; request claim status in writing. They minimize payouts. Revoke prior statements.

description: Maybe; stop talking, get lawyer now.
